stories.notes: Run npm run e2e:readonly only against an explicitly supplied non-production URL. The runner refuses the production domain.
Requires successful integration preflight and deterministic fixture reset.

actions.userAction: Complete the required tax-lien deal form and save

journey.persistedOutcome: A fixture-tenant deal exists and its DEAL_CREATED audit event carries the response request ID.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset removes the created deal and its dependent records.

stories.notes: Requires an isolated fixture parcel and correlation with the enrichment audit event.

actions.userAction: Enter the fixture APN and request parcel enrichment

journey.persistedOutcome: The fixture-tenant parcel cache reflects the enrichment and its PARCEL_ENRICH_REQUEST audit event carries the response request ID.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset removes the parcel cache record.

stories.notes: Requires an isolated fixture parcel, disabled AI/auction side effects, and correlation with the research audit event.

actions.userAction: Enter the fixture APN and run pre-purchase research

journey.persistedOutcome: The returned research result is correlated to a fixture-tenant PRE_PURCHASE_RESEARCH audit event by response request ID.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset removes any related fixture research data.

stories.notes: Requires an isolated jurisdiction fixture and correlation with the field-report audit event.

actions.userAction: Submit a field report with fixture-safe details

journey.persistedOutcome: The fixture-tenant field report is persisted and its JURISDICTION_PROFILE_FLAGGED audit event carries the response request ID.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset removes the field report.

stories.notes: Requires an isolated super-admin fixture and deterministic reset of authority claims.

actions.userAction: Select a verified local source, choose the authority scope, cite the evidence, and publish

journey.persistedOutcome: The fixture jurisdiction has a current authority-scope claim and its JURISDICTION_AUTHORITY_SCOPE_PUBLISHED audit event carries the response request ID.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset removes the authority-scope claim and its dependent evidence records.

stories.notes: Requires an isolated super-admin fixture and deterministic reset of authority boundaries.

actions.userAction: Select the current unincorporated authority claim, submit reviewed GeoJSON, and save

journey.persistedOutcome: The fixture jurisdiction has a current reviewed authority boundary and its JURISDICTION_AUTHORITY_BOUNDARY_PUBLISHED audit event carries the response request ID.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset removes the authority-boundary record.

stories.notes: Requires an isolated owner and Clerk organization fixture with deterministic invitation cleanup.

actions.userAction: Enter the fixture member email and send an invitation

journey.persistedOutcome: The fixture organization has the expected invitation and its TEAM_MEMBER_INVITED audit event carries the response request ID without the invitee email in metadata.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset removes the Clerk invitation and any related fixture membership.

stories.notes: Requires a fixture owner/member pair and deterministic membership-role reset.

actions.userAction: Select the fixture member role and save the change

journey.persistedOutcome: The fixture member has the selected role and its TEAM_MEMBER_ROLE_CHANGED audit event carries the response request ID.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset restores the fixture member role.

stories.notes: Requires an isolated owner and deterministic workflow-rule cleanup.

actions.userAction: Complete the fixture-safe workflow rule form and save

journey.persistedOutcome: A fixture-tenant workflow rule exists and its WORKFLOW_RULE_CREATED audit event carries the response request ID without action configuration.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset removes the workflow rule and its audit event.

stories.notes: Requires an isolated owner, fixture workflow rule, and deterministic restoration before deletion cleanup.

actions.userAction: Toggle the fixture workflow rule and then delete it

journey.persistedOutcome: The fixture workflow rule records a correlated WORKFLOW_RULE_UPDATED event, then is removed with a correlated WORKFLOW_RULE_DELETED event.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset restores or removes any fixture workflow rule and related audit events.

stories.notes: Requires an isolated owner tenant with a dedicated disposable AI-key fixture and deterministic credential cleanup.

actions.userAction: Save the fixture AI key and then remove it

journey.persistedOutcome: The fixture tenant key is configured and removed only by an owner; each change has an AI_KEY_CONFIGURATION_CHANGED audit event carrying its response request ID without the credential.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset removes the dedicated fixture credential and related audit events.

stories.notes: Requires an isolated owner tenant and deterministic restoration of investment assumptions.

actions.userAction: Save fixture investor assumptions in exit options

journey.persistedOutcome: The fixture tenant investor profile is updated by an owner and its INVESTOR_PROFILE_UPDATED event carries the response request ID without financial assumptions or licenses.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset restores the investor profile and related audit event.

stories.notes: Requires an isolated analyst fixture, a deal with missing checklist items, and deterministic task cleanup.

journey.persistedOutcome: The fixture deal receives only its missing checklist tasks and one CHECKLIST_CREATED audit event carrying the response request ID without task text.
journey.cleanup: The integration fixture reset removes generated checklist tasks and the related audit event.
